steps.title: Use a broad introduction
steps.content: The student wants to introduce the Slow Food movement to a new audience. The best sentence should give basic context about the movement and summarize its main goals, not focus on one small detail.

steps.title: Reject too-narrow options
steps.content: Choice B mentions only food production workers. Choice C focuses on founding dates rather than explaining the movement's purpose. Choice D lists goals but gives less context for a new audience than a full introduction needs. The answer is A.
